envelope.subject: INFY — Update: pace of deal closures; PT ₹1,750
envelope.bodyText: INFY: Buy reiterated. PT ₹1,750. Deal momentum into FY27 looks healthy. See https://research.kotak.com/notes/infy-2026-04-22 for the full note (no PDF attached).

linkedRefs.cachedText: INFY — Update. We reiterate Buy. PT ₹1,750 (unchanged). Deal pipeline expanded by $1.8bn TCV in Q4. Margins held at 21.4% despite wage hikes. Risks: US BFSI slowdown.
